title: corysanthes hispida
intro: Corysanthes hispida, also known as the hairy club moss, is a type of ancient vascular plant that belongs to the order Lycopodiales. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Corysanthes hispida include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Corysanthes hispida can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for a variety of herbal preparations to be made for medicinal use.
